concepts_used.title: 遗传算法
concepts_used.how_used: 使用遗传算法优化仓库位置，以最大化一日达覆盖面积。种群由ZIP码组成，通过选择、交叉、变异迭代进化，适应度函数为覆盖像素数。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We created a genetic algorithm to optimize the coverage of the United States using a certain number of warehouses.

concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 在遗传算法中引入蒙特卡洛方法，通过随机采样生成初始种群和变异操作，模拟随机搜索过程。

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Python程序从UPS网站获取一日达地图图像，并叠加ZIP码位置，通过像素分析计算覆盖面积，实现地理信息可视化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The Python programs we created retrieved maps as image files from ups.com and allowed us to overlay combinations of ZIP codes and analyze the pixels of the resulting images.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变仓库数量（从23到32），分析覆盖面积和人口覆盖率的变化，评估模型对仓库数量的敏感度。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We found that with 23 warehouses, it was possible to cover 95.89% of the continental United States and provide one-day transit to 99.6% of the population.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出10条模型假设，每条假设附有理由，例如假设UPS地图准确、ZIP码覆盖相似、优化基于人口而非面积等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Maps provided by UPS are accurate. Justification: The problem shows a map from the UPS, so we assumed that the UPS is a valid source.

concepts_used.title: 模型对比的可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 对比不同仓库数量（23 vs 32）下的覆盖面积、人口覆盖率和平均税率，通过表格和文字说明展示权衡。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: When we use 32 warehouses, area coverage is 83.89% of continental U.S., and the average tax rate is 2.27%. ... If 23 warehouses are built, area coverage will be 99.56% and the average tax rate will be 5.07%.
